objections.objection_text: Financial constraint due to child support and divorce costs.
objections.underlying_belief: Safety is found in hoarding remaining resources rather than investing in spiritual health.
objections.underlying_fear: Running out of money and failing kids further.
objections.counter_truth_angle: The cost of staying stuck (idolatry) is higher than the financial investment in freedom.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: Let me look at my finances and see, you know, how I can fit that in, if I can move some things around. I pay child support... that's going to put me in a bind.
